thinking:
**Adjusting Animation Duration**

Okay, so I got feedback that the changes were well-received, but the animation feels a tad too fast. Currently, it's set to `duration-300` with a custom `ease-[cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)]`. My plan is to lengthen the animation duration; that should slow it down, right? I'll probably tweak the `duration` value and test various increments to dial in the perfect timing.

args.Description: "Altera a duração da animação do tooltip na sidebar de 300ms para 500ms para torná-la ligeiramente mais suave e lenta."
args.Instruction: "Alterar duration-300 para duration-500 na div do tooltip para desacelerar a transição."
args.ReplacementContent:
" {/* Balão/Tooltip flutuante de sobreposição perfeita no desktop com animação slide-in e leve transparência */}
setActiveTab(label)} className="absolute left-0 top-0 h-12 hidden lg:flex items-center justify-start bg-[#533af6]/75 backdrop-blur-[6px] text-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_10px_25px_rgba(83,58,246,0.25)] cursor-pointer pointer-events-none opacity-0 translate-x-[-24px] group-hover/item:opacity-100 group-hover/item:translate-x-0 group-hover/item:pointer-events-auto transition-all duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1)] z-[110] w-auto whitespace-nowrap pl-[15px] pr-6 gap-3" > {label}
"
args.TargetContent:
